title: juncago
intro: Juncago is a plant species that belongs to the family of flowering plants known as Poaceae. It is native to South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The plant has been found to have antifungal and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating infections and wounds. Juncago can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions and tinctures, to aid in the treatment of various health issues, including fever reduction and inflammation relief.
